# DjVu.js

This directory contains the browser bundle of DjVu.js Library 0.5.4 from
https://github.com/RussCoder/djvujs, built from commit `b41bd0557bd5` (master on
2026-07-17). The library is distributed under GNU GPL v2. The viewer code in
Seshat remains separate and uses the documented public browser API.
